My security engineering practice covers application security, cloud security, and compliance across the full software delivery lifecycle. The foundation of my work is threat modeling — I facilitate STRIDE sessions during design review, producing threat models that directly inform secure code review focus areas and penetration testing scope.

Penetration testing is where I find the most critical issues: I conduct web application assessments mapping findings to OWASP Top 10 categories, followed by authenticated API testing with custom tooling. I complement manual testing with SAST tooling (Semgrep, CodeQL) and DAST scanning (OWASP ZAP, Burp Suite) integrated into CI/CD gates so that vulnerability assessment happens continuously, not just at release time.

On the identity and cryptography side, I review OAuth 2.0 and OIDC implementations for authorization flaws, validate SAML assertion handling, and design PKI and TLS certificate lifecycle management. Secrets management via HashiCorp Vault and AWS Secrets Manager is a standard design pattern I enforce. For compliance, I have led SOC2 Type II and ISO27001 audit preparation, mapping controls to SIEM detection rules in AWS Security Hub and Splunk, and supporting incident response and forensic investigation procedures.
